Journella
Home Support Privacy

Your day at a glance.

Journella brings notes, tasks, events, search, and AI-assisted planning into one warm, focused experience. Keep what matters close, move from idea to action, and ask Journella anything without breaking your flow.

See your day in one place Home keeps recent notes, open tasks, and upcoming events together.
Capture and reopen what matters Notes stay close to Search, so it is easy to get back to the right detail quickly.
Ask Journella anything Use AI help when you want to turn rough intent into a note, task, or event.

Capture what matters, then keep shaping it.

From quick personal entries to AI-assisted drafts, Journella keeps notes close to the rest of your day so ideas do not get stranded between separate tools.

Notes list Browse recent notes, spot AI-generated drafts, and reopen what needs attention.
Editing Refine a quick thought into a clearer plan without moving it somewhere else first.

Keep tasks and calendar in the same flow.

Tasks and events stay visible next to each other, so planning today and following through tomorrow feel connected instead of split across apps.

Tasks Track open work, completed follow-through, and what still needs your attention.
Calendar See the month, inspect upcoming events, and add something new when plans change.

Ask Journella anything when you need a next step.

Start from a suggestion or type your own prompt. Journella helps you move from a rough idea to something actionable inside the app.

Prompt suggestions Use quick starting points when you want help deciding what to capture next.
From intent to action Keep the conversation close to the notes, tasks, and events you want to create.

Fine-tune the experience around your day.

Control Apple Calendar and Apple Reminders access, refresh imports, and keep optional integrations configured the way you want them.

Apple integrations Connect only the Apple services you want Journella to use for your planning flow.
Focused controls Keep the setup simple when you want the app to stay light and calm.
Journella

Your day at a glance.
